hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // "unknown"' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.md|*.json|*.env*|*settings*|*MEMORY*|*memory*|*plans/*) exit 0 ;; esac; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"SKILL GATE CHECK: Before editing code, have you invoked the relevant skill? If not, STOP and invoke it FIRST. Skill gates are BLOCKING per CLAUDE.md — no exceptions, even for small fixes. UI → frontend-design. API/backend → engineering-skills. Architecture → engineering-skills. DB → engineering-advanced-skills. Security → engineering-advanced-skills. Product/UX → product-skills."}}'; }
